events.label: reasoning
events.text: We need answer JSON only. Need assess scenario: Wire pulling feeders & branch industrial site, rough-complete. Photos show completed pieces but area count and remaining scope not listed. Submitted package does not include quantity takeoff needed to score checkpoint. Reference NEC 200.6, 210.5 identification. Need decide pass/fail/needs_more_info. Since package lacks quantity takeoff needed to score checkpoint, and identification maybe not verifiable? Need produce decision likely needs_more_info because insufficient documentation to assess completion/remaining scope. But also could fail if non-compliant? Scenario says no defects flagged, judge from evidence. However submitted package does not include quantity takeoff needed to score checkpoint. That suggests cannot determine percent complete or remaining scope. Decision: needs_more_info. Risk maybe medium due to inability to verify completeness and identification compliance. Work_stage rough-complete. Component_conditions empty. Percent_complete unknown? Numeric estimate maybe 0 or unknown; schema requires number. Could set percent_complete: 0 because cannot estimate? But maybe set to null? It says numeric estimate. If unknown, maybe 0. But better to indicate unknown? The schema requires 0. Could set 0. Value 0. Findings: missing quantity takeoff; area count and remaining scope not listed; cannot verify identification per NEC 200.6/210.5 without takeoff and inspection. Actions: submit quantity takeoff and area count; verify conductor identification. Rationale. References NEC 200.6, 210.5. Need ensure JSON valid. No prose outside.
